The '''Borlovians''' were a feathered race native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Borlov]] that communicated with multi-layered whistles and trills. They were a timid [[Species/Legends|species]] with a medieval social structure that valued stability; mobility and change were quite frowned upon, and most never left the [[City/Legends|city]] or village of their birth. [[Realspace/Legends|Space]] travel was all but unthinkable until the Borlovian misfit [[Llollulion]] departed with [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Booster Terrik]].

{{Species-stub}}
